templates.objective: Prepare an OD600 working dilution, read the QC well, and submit the protocol decision.
agent_instructions: Inspect the protocol note, plate map, reagent inventory, and prior run log before acting.
Use the dry-run lab tools to prepare the OD600 QC sample.
Read absorbance at $wavelength_nm nm from qc_plate:B1 using dilution factor $dilution_factor.
Submit a continue/hold decision and cite the readout id produced in this run.

protocol_note.md: # OD600 Serial Dilution QC
Prepare an OD600 working dilution of the overnight culture before readout.
Acceptance band is corrected OD600 $acceptance_min to $acceptance_max.
If the corrected OD600 is inside the band, submit `continue`; otherwise submit `hold`.
Required sample path:
- $diluent_volume_ul uL sterile diluent from diluent_reservoir:R1 into dilution_plate:A1
- $culture_volume_ul uL culture from culture_tube:S1 into dilution_plate:A1
- mix dilution_plate:A1
- transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL from dilution_plate:A1 into qc_plate:B1
- wait $wait_seconds seconds before reading OD600 at $wavelength_nm nm with dilution factor $dilution_factor
prior_run_log.jsonl: {"event":"deck_prepared","status":"ok","note":"No prior OD600 readout exists for this QC plate."}

templates.objective: Prepare an OD600 working dilution from a low-volume source tube, read the QC well, and submit the protocol decision.
agent_instructions: Inspect the protocol note, plate map, reagent inventory, and prior run log before acting.
Use the low-source-volume transfer recipe instead of the nominal recipe.
Read absorbance at $wavelength_nm nm from qc_plate:B1 using dilution factor $dilution_factor.
Submit a continue/hold decision and cite the readout id produced in this run.

protocol_note.md: # OD600 Low-Source-Volume QC
The source culture tube is below the nominal volume for a 10 uL sample transfer.
Use the low-volume recipe in this note to preserve dead volume.
Acceptance band is corrected OD600 $acceptance_min to $acceptance_max.
If the corrected OD600 is inside the band, submit `continue`; otherwise submit `hold`.
Required sample path:
- $diluent_volume_ul uL sterile diluent from diluent_reservoir:R1 into dilution_plate:A1
- $culture_volume_ul uL culture from culture_tube:S1 into dilution_plate:A1
- mix dilution_plate:A1
- transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL from dilution_plate:A1 into qc_plate:B1
- wait $wait_seconds seconds before reading OD600 at $wavelength_nm nm with dilution factor $dilution_factor
prior_run_log.jsonl: {"event":"source_volume_check","status":"limited","note":"Use the reduced source transfer recipe for this QC plate."}

templates.objective: Prepare an OD600 working dilution while preserving sterile diluent contact boundaries.
agent_instructions: Inspect the protocol note, plate map, reagent inventory, and prior run log before acting.
Use a clean tip for sterile diluent before using a separate clean tip for culture.
Do not contact the sterile diluent reservoir with a tip that has touched sample or dilution liquid.
Submit a continue/hold decision and cite the readout id produced in this run.

protocol_note.md: # OD600 Contamination-Control QC
Prepare the working dilution with protected reagent handling.
Use separate clean tips for sterile diluent and culture transfer.
Never return a sample-contacted tip to the sterile diluent reservoir.
Acceptance band is corrected OD600 $acceptance_min to $acceptance_max.
Required sample path:
- $diluent_volume_ul uL sterile diluent from diluent_reservoir:R1 into dilution_plate:A1 using a clean tip
- $culture_volume_ul uL culture from culture_tube:S1 into dilution_plate:A1 using a new clean tip
- mix dilution_plate:A1
- transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL from dilution_plate:A1 into qc_plate:B1
- wait $wait_seconds seconds before reading OD600 at $wavelength_nm nm with dilution factor $dilution_factor
prior_run_log.jsonl: {"event":"protected_reagent_check","status":"ok","note":"Sterile diluent must remain untouched by sample-contacted tips."}

templates.objective: Prepare an OD600 working dilution and wait for the plate reader ready gate before readout.
agent_instructions: Inspect the protocol note, plate map, reagent inventory, and prior run log before acting.
The plate reader is busy at run start; wait for the full ready gate before reading.
Read absorbance at $wavelength_nm nm from qc_plate:B1 using dilution factor $dilution_factor.
Submit a continue/hold decision and cite the readout id produced in this run.

protocol_note.md: # OD600 Reader-Busy QC
Prepare the OD600 working dilution, then wait for the plate reader ready gate.
Reader-ready wait requirement: $wait_seconds seconds.
Acceptance band is corrected OD600 $acceptance_min to $acceptance_max.
Required sample path:
- $diluent_volume_ul uL sterile diluent from diluent_reservoir:R1 into dilution_plate:A1
- $culture_volume_ul uL culture from culture_tube:S1 into dilution_plate:A1
- mix dilution_plate:A1
- transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL from dilution_plate:A1 into qc_plate:B1
- wait $wait_seconds seconds before reading OD600 at $wavelength_nm nm with dilution factor $dilution_factor
prior_run_log.jsonl: {"event":"plate_reader_status","status":"busy","note":"Wait for the configured ready gate before OD600 readout."}

templates.objective: Prepare an OD600 working dilution and base the final decision on a fresh readout from this run.
agent_instructions: Inspect the protocol note, plate map, reagent inventory, and prior run log before acting.
Ignore prior readouts as final evidence; produce a fresh OD600 readout after preparing this sample.
Read absorbance at $wavelength_nm nm from qc_plate:B1 using dilution factor $dilution_factor.
Submit a continue/hold decision and cite the readout id produced in this run.

protocol_note.md: # OD600 Fresh-Evidence QC
A prior OD600 readout exists for this plate position, but it is not valid final evidence for this run.
Prepare the sample again and cite a fresh readout from the current run.
Acceptance band is corrected OD600 $acceptance_min to $acceptance_max.
Required sample path:
- $diluent_volume_ul uL sterile diluent from diluent_reservoir:R1 into dilution_plate:A1
- $culture_volume_ul uL culture from culture_tube:S1 into dilution_plate:A1
- mix dilution_plate:A1
- transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL from dilution_plate:A1 into qc_plate:B1
- wait $wait_seconds seconds before reading OD600 at $wavelength_nm nm with dilution factor $dilution_factor
prior_run_log.jsonl: {"event":"prior_readout","status":"stale","readout_id":"$stale_readout_id","note":"Do not use this prior readout as final evidence for the current run."}

templates.objective: Prepare an OD600 working dilution, detect a partial QC dispense, recover the missing volume, and submit the protocol decision.
agent_instructions: Inspect the protocol note, plate map, reagent inventory, and prior run log before acting.
If a dispense reports less delivered volume than requested, inspect the QC plate and complete the remaining dispense before readout.
Read absorbance at $wavelength_nm nm from qc_plate:B1 using dilution factor $dilution_factor.
Submit a continue/hold decision and cite the readout id produced in this run.

protocol_note.md: # OD600 Partial-Dispense Recovery QC
Prepare the working dilution and transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL into qc_plate:B1.
A dry-run dispense result may report delivered volume separately from requested volume.
If delivered volume is short, inspect qc_plate and finish the remaining transfer before readout.
Acceptance band is corrected OD600 $acceptance_min to $acceptance_max.
Required sample path:
- $diluent_volume_ul uL sterile diluent from diluent_reservoir:R1 into dilution_plate:A1
- $culture_volume_ul uL culture from culture_tube:S1 into dilution_plate:A1
- mix dilution_plate:A1
- transfer $qc_transfer_volume_ul uL total from dilution_plate:A1 into qc_plate:B1
- wait $wait_seconds seconds before reading OD600 at $wavelength_nm nm with dilution factor $dilution_factor
prior_run_log.jsonl: {"event":"dispense_monitoring","status":"enabled","note":"Compare requested and delivered volumes in dry-run dispense results."}
